MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-31-2019 IN 206, DEFENDANTS EVELYN ADLER, LIBBY ADLER AND LLOYD MURPHY'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE WAS HEARD. APPEARANCES BY NEGAD ZAKY, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF AND WALTER MCMATH, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANTS. ARGUED AND THE COURT FOUND GOOD CAUSE DUE TO DEFENSE COUNSEL'S INADVERTENCE/MISTAKE AND GRANTED THE MOTION. THE TRIAL DATE OF 11/04/19 IS CONTINUED TO 02/10/20 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE COURT ORDERED DEFENSE COUNSEL TO PAY REASONABLE COSTS FOR ANY ADDITIONAL EXPENSE INCURRED BY PLAINTIFF AS A RESULT OF THE CONTINUANCE PURSUANT TO CCP 1024. COUNSEL TO MEET AND CONFER ON THAT ISSUE TO DETERMINE A REASONABLE SUM. THE COURT DENIED PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO REOPEN DISCOVERY AND EXTEND THE CUT-OFF DATES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/GLW)
